variables.input:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| summarize values = collectDistinct(userEmailNorm)
| expand values
| sort values
| fields values

0.content:
## Usage Tracking Dashboard
Monitor how users interact with the Business Observability Demonstrator app.

Events are emitted as `bizevents.audit.usage.*` BizEvents with fields: `json.feature`, `json.auditAction`, `json.pagePath`, `json.targetPath`, `json.userEmail`, `json.userName`.

1.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| summarize totalEvents = count()
1.title: Total Usage Events (24h)

2.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter userEmailNorm != "" and userEmailNorm != "unknown"
| summarize activeUsers = countDistinct(userEmailNorm)
2.title: Active Users (24h)

3.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| makeTimeseries events = count(), interval: 5m
3.title: Events Per Minute (24h)

4.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| summarize events = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { featureNorm, actionNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 100
4.title: Feature Activity (Operational View)

5.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter pagePathNorm != ""
| summarize views = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { pagePathNorm }
| sort views desc
| limit 50
5.title: Top Pages Viewed

6.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| fieldsAdd navTargetNorm = coalesce(targetPathNorm, pagePathNorm, "")
| filter navTargetNorm != ""
| summarize clicks = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { navTargetNorm }
| sort clicks desc
| limit 50
6.title: Top Navigation Targets (with fallback)

7.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter featureNorm == "journey" or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "create-journey") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "journey") or matchesPhrase(pagePathNorm, "journey")
| summarize events = count(), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, actionNorm, companyNameNorm, journeyTypeNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 150
7.title: Journey Activity (7d)

8.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter pagePathNorm == "/demonstrator-dashboards" or matchesPhrase(pagePathNorm, "dashboard") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "dashboard") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "services")
| summarize events = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { actionNorm, pagePathNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 100
8.title: Dashboard Usage Activity

9.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "ai") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "copilot") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "librarian") or matchesPhrase(pagePathNorm, "ai") or featureNorm == "fixit" or matchesPhrase(sourceNorm, "ai")
| summarize events = count(), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, featureNorm, actionNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 150
9.title: AI / Agent-Related Activity

10.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| summarize activity = count(), featuresUsed = countDistinct(featureNorm), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm }
| sort activity desc
| limit 100
10.title: Top Users by Activity

11.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter userEmailNorm != "" and userEmailNorm != "unknown"
| makeTimeseries dau = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), interval: 1d
11.title: Daily Active Users Trend

12.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| summarize total = count(), missingEmail = countIf(userEmailNorm == "" or userEmailNorm == "unknown"), missingName = countIf(userNameNorm == "" or userNameNorm == "unknown")
12.title: Data Quality: Missing User Identity

13.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| fields timestamp, event.type, sourceNorm, featureNorm, actionNorm, userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, companyNameNorm, journeyTypeNorm, pagePathNorm, targetPathNorm
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 300
13.title: Latest Usage Events (Debug, Raw)

14.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter featureNorm == "journey" or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "create-journey") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "journey")
| fieldsAdd creationMode = if(matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "manual"), "manual", else: if(matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "ai"), "ai", else: "other")), tenantScope = if(companyNameNorm == "Dynatrace Internal", "internal", else: "customer")
| summarize created = count(), by: { creationMode, tenantScope, actionNorm, companyNameNorm, journeyTypeNorm }
| sort created desc
| limit 200
14.title: Journeys Created by Type (7d)

15.content:
## Area 1: Product Usage
Track adoption, user behavior, and feature engagement across the app.

16.content:
## Area 2: Operational & Data Quality
Monitor event fidelity, taxonomy consistency, and raw diagnostics.

17.title: Companies Created by User (7d, all modes)
17.query:
fetch bizevents
| parse rqBody, "JSON:rq"
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.") or startsWith(coalesce(json.eventType, rq.eventType, json.stepName, rq.stepName, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(coalesce(event.type, ""), "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, rq.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, rq.auditAction, json.action, rq.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, rq.pagePath, rq.additionalFields.path, additionalfields.path, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, rq.targetPath, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, rq.userName, userName, additionalfields.userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, rq.userEmail, userEmail, additionalfields.userEmail, "unknown"), companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, rq.companyName, event.provider, "unknown"), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, rq.journeyType, ""), sourceNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.source, rq.additionalFields.source, "unknown")
| filter in(userEmailNorm, $UserEmail) or in("*", $UserEmail)
| filter featureNorm == "journey" or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "create-journey") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "journey")
| summarize events = count(), journeys = countDistinct(journeyTypeNorm), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, companyNameNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 200
